acquisition method: To acquire MS/MS spectra in the top 20 data-dependent acquisition modes
alkylation reagent: 100 μl of 200 mM IAA was used for alkylation
alkylation concentration: 100 μl of 200 mM IAA was used for alkylation
collision energy: stepped HCD normalized collision energies at 20%, 30%, and 31%
enrichment method: After ZIC-HILIC enrichment and isotopic labeling
instrument: a Q Exactive mass spectrometer with nano-ESI tandem
ionization type: Q Exactive mass spectrometer with nano-ESI tandem
labeling: Differential cell-surface N-glycosylation of ovarian cancer SKOV3 cells were quantitatively analyzed by isotopic labeling
